nasb.text: Then the glory of the Lord went up from the cherub to the threshold of the temple, and the temple was filled with the cloud and the court was filled with the brightness of the glory of the Lord.

esv.text: And the glory of the Lord  went up from the cherub to the threshold of the house, and the house was filled with the cloud, and the court was filled with the brightness of the glory of the Lord.

cnv.text: 耶和華的榮耀從基路伯上面升到殿的門檻那裡；殿裡充滿了雲彩，院子也充滿了耶和華榮耀的光輝。

ccb.text: 耶和华的荣耀从基路伯天使的上面升起，停在殿的门口，殿里充满了云彩，院子也充满了耶和华荣耀的光辉。
